title: Subdomain Association
description: Schema for a subdomain association JSON file. Subdomain associations describe constraint relationships between subdomains in the same domain where a problem subdomain enforces requirements on a solution subdomain.

problem_subdomain_key.description: The key of the problem subdomain that enforces requirements. Must match a subdomain directory under this domain.

solution_subdomain_key.description: The key of the solution subdomain that satisfies the requirements. Must match a subdomain directory under this domain and differ from problem_subdomain_key.

uml_comment.description: Optional UML comment for this subdomain association.
